creator: nick@rogness.net
text:
I've tried to remove snort_inline from the ports tree.  It is no longer actively developed or maintained.

Please remove it.


------Original Message------
From: Edwin Groothuis
To: nick@rogness.net
Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
ReplyTo: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/161410: security/snort_inline past its EXPIRATION_DATE
Sent: Oct 8, 2011 9:20 PM

Maintainer of security/snort_inline,

Please note that PR ports/161410 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
and a committer will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161410

-- 
Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
edwin@FreeBSD.org


Sent from my Verizon Wireless BlackBerry
